**Status**: approved
**Design Document**: `.github/ideation/designs/{design-doc}.md`

## What Was Designed

> One-paragraph summary of what this design covers — the feature, its purpose, and the user problem it solves.

## Approved Direction

> The selected visual direction and why it was chosen.

- **Comp**: [descriptive name and ID, e.g., "Minimal Catalog (B)"]
- **Comp folder**: `.github/comps/approved/{feature-name}/`
- **Personality**: [one-sentence vibe — e.g., "Clean, focused, and content-forward"]

## Design System

> Reference to the formalized design system produced by Axiom.

- **Design system**: `.github/style/design-system.md`
- **Spacing**: [base unit, e.g., "8px scale"]
- **Typography**: [primary font + scale summary, e.g., "Inter, 14/20 body, 32/40 H1"]
- **Color tokens**: [count and approach, e.g., "12 semantic tokens mapped to switchable palette"]

## Accessibility Requirements

> Summary of accessibility commitments baked into the approved comps.

- WCAG 2.2 AA contrast ratios verified
- Keyboard navigation tested
- Semantic HTML structure defined
- Focus indicators specified
- Target sizes meet minimums (24×24px, 44×44 preferred)
